metadata.title: Gîte Angèle | Charming Cottage for 12 with Pool — Cantal, Auvergne, France
metadata.description: Charming gîte for 12 guests in Sénezergues, Cantal. Private pool, 180° panoramic veranda, traditional cantou fireplace, stunning views over the Châtaigneraie Cantalienne.

hero.subtitle: Restored 18th-century farmhouse · Sleeps 12
hero.title1: The art of living in Cantal
hero.title2: in a haven of unspoiled nature

presentation.text1: Nestled in the heart of the Châtaigneraie Cantalienne, between Maurs and Calvinet, Gîte Angèle reveals the authentic soul of a beautifully restored farmhouse.
presentation.text2: 173 m² of living space at Le Valat in Sénezergues, breathtaking panoramas, and the absolute tranquillity that only Cantal can offer. Here, time stands still for what truly matters.

story.title: The Story of Angèle
story.p1: Angèle was a woman of character, deeply rooted in this Cantal land. Every morning, she walked to the market in Calvinet, rain or shine. She tended her garden with inexhaustible energy, crossing the decades with a courage and joie de vivre that left a mark on everyone who knew her.
story.p2: Today, her granddaughter Marie carries on this legacy. And fate decreed that her own granddaughter should also bear the name Angèle — just as lively and luminous as her great-great-grandmother. Our wish is simple: that you feel as much at home here as the generations who came before, in renewed comfort and a preserved environment.

items.title: The Panoramic Veranda
items.description: A true belvedere overlooking the Cantal countryside. Bathed in light, it offers stunning 180° views over the wooded valleys of the Châtaigneraie. Billiards, board games and a reading corner for family evenings.
items.alt: Stone facade with panoramic veranda at sunset — Gîte Angèle, Sénezergues

items.title: The Cantou
items.description: The beating heart of the house. Around the traditional Auvergne fireplace — the cantou — evenings linger in a warm and cosy atmosphere. The wood stove heats the room for autumn and winter stays.
items.alt: Stone cantou with wood stove in the lounge of Gîte Angèle, Cantal

items.title: The Bedrooms
items.description: Four distinct worlds for restful nights. From the romance of the master suite to the adventurous spirit of the dormitory with its teepee. Premium bedding, sheets and towels provided.
items.alt: King-size bedroom with premium bedding at Gîte Angèle, Cantal

items.title: Dining under the Stars
items.description: A large 12-seat table under the pergola. Share memorable meals outdoors, lulled by the song of cicadas and the gentle Cantal evening. Zero light pollution — the starry sky is a show in itself.
items.alt: Pergola with large outdoor dining table and countryside views at Gîte Angèle

items.title: Outdoor & Pool
items.description: A private oasis of freshness, secured and fenced, in a green setting with views over the hills. Swim under Cantal's intense blue sky or beneath the Milky Way.
items.alt: Sun loungers with panoramic views over the Cantal countryside — Gîte Angèle

items.title: Angèle's Garden
items.description: Our vegetable garden invites you to pick fresh herbs, tomatoes and seasonal vegetables for your meals. A compost bin is provided — here, we care for the earth just as Angèle did.
items.alt: Angèle's Garden — vegetable patch and herbs at Gîte Angèle, Sénezergues

region.title: At the gates of wonder
region.subtitle: Discover an exceptional territory between ancient volcanoes, charming villages and sacred heritage. The Châtaigneraie Cantalienne — between Maurs, Calvinet, Montsalvy, Mourjou and Cassaniouze — is a well-kept secret of slow tourism in Auvergne, featured on Échappées Belles (France 5).

highlights.title: Conques UNESCO
highlights.description: 30 min away. The Sainte-Foy Abbey, a jewel of Romanesque art on the Way of St James (GR 65).

highlights.title: Auvergne Volcanoes
highlights.description: Puy Mary, Grand Site de France (1h). Grandiose panoramas over Europe's largest volcanic chain.

highlights.title: Nature & Hiking
highlights.description: The GR 65 and hundreds of marked trails starting from the gîte. Slow tourism in the heart of the Châtaigneraie.

highlights.title: Gastronomy
highlights.description: Land of 5 AOP cheeses — Cantal, Salers, Saint-Nectaire, Bleu d'Auvergne, Fourme d'Ambert. Truffade, aligot, chestnuts, chestnut honey and Marcillac wines.

region.quote: Échappées Belles (France 5) revealed to the public the hidden treasures of our corner of Cantal.

items.name: Spring
items.description: Nature's awakening. The valleys are covered with wildflowers, ideal for hikers seeking colour.

items.name: Summer
items.description: The sweet life. Swimming, night markets, festivals and unforgettable starry skies.

items.name: Autumn
items.description: Indian summer. The chestnut groves turn gold. Season of mushrooms and forest walks.

items.name: Winter
items.description: Cocooning time. Evenings by the cantou, skiing at Super Lioran (45 min), and Christmas markets.

reviews.quote: Love at first sight for this gîte! It has everything you need, it's remarkable. We even got potatoes and onions from the garden. The private pool is a real bonus.
reviews.author: Family D.

reviews.quote: A very calm place with a magnificent view of the surrounding countryside. The pool is perfectly situated amidst the fields. Perfect for recharging.
reviews.author: Caroline M.

reviews.quote: The welcome was charming and the welcome gifts were much appreciated. All the ingredients were there for a wonderful family holiday.
reviews.author: Philippe R.

reviews.quote: An exceptional setting, a warm welcome, and that view... We never wanted to leave. The cantou is a real joy for family evenings.
reviews.author: Isabelle T.

reviews.quote: Spacious, comfortable and well-equipped cottage in a very calm setting. Beautiful outdoor space. The pool is a real asset.
reviews.author: Marc & Sophie L.

reviews.quote: Absolute tranquility, unspoilt nature and hikes right from the doorstep — what more could you ask for? An ideal place for family or friends.
reviews.author: Anne-Laure B.
